# Segments presets

This package contains methods for managing user created segments presets (filters).

```cmd
npm install @dynatrace-sdk/segments-presets
```

### Example usage

Getting user segments presets
```typescript
import { getSegmentsPresets } from '@dynatrace-sdk/segments-presets';

async function getUserSegmentsPresets() {
  const { pinnedPresets, recentPresets } = await getSegmentsPresets();
}
```

### API reference

See the package reference in the [Dynatrace Developer](https://developer.dynatrace.com/develop/sdks/segments-presets/).
